Magician's Red — Bizarre Lineage

Avdol's fire Stand. Strong AoE damage and consistent DPS, perfect for PvE farming. Beginner-friendly with straightforward mechanics.

Tier: B PvP: 6/10 PvE: 7/10 Rarity: Rare

Magician's Red Core Statistics

Damage 8/10
Sustain 4/10
PvP Score 6/10
PvE Score 7/10
Mobility 5/10

How to Get Magician's Red

Stand Arrow (Rare rarity, ~10% chance).

Tier Ranking

B-Tier in the Bizarre Lineage tier list. View full tier list →

Pro Tips for Magician's Red

  • Cross Fire Hurricane + Flame Pillar zones areas effectively
  • Great beginner Stand with simple, effective mechanics
  • Heat Detection counters King Crimson's Time Erase

Best Build for Magician's Red in Bizarre Lineage

Best Fighting Style: Boxing

Reliable combos, high burst, close-range specialist. Great for extending M1 chains and maximizing damage output in close quarters. The most popular fighting style.

Flame Barrage

5s

10s

Magician's Red FAQ — Bizarre Lineage

Is Magician's Red good in Bizarre Lineage?

Magician's Red is a B-tier Stand in Bizarre Lineage with a PvP score of 6/10 and PvE score of 7/10. Avdol's fire Stand. Strong AoE damage and consistent DPS, perfect for PvE farming. Beginner-friendly with straightforward mechanics.

How do I get Magician's Red in Bizarre Lineage?

In Bizarre Lineage, Magician's Red can be obtained by: Stand Arrow (Rare rarity, ~10% chance).. As a Rare rarity Stand, it has approximately a 10% chance from Stand Arrows. Use Bizarre Lineage codes to get free Stand Arrows and increase your chances.

What is the best fighting style for Magician's Red in Bizarre Lineage?

The recommended fighting style for Magician's Red in Bizarre Lineage is Boxing. Reliable combos, high burst, close-range specialist. Great for extending M1 chains and maximizing damage output in close quarters. The most popular fighting style.

What are Magician's Red's best abilities in Bizarre Lineage?

Magician's Red has 6 abilities in Bizarre Lineage. Cross Fire Hurricane + Flame Pillar zones areas effectively See the full moveset breakdown above.
